name: Peergum.GitHub.io
body:
Hey, welcome to this page.

Here are the projects I'm currently working on:
* PigTalk, a stats-based language recognition and generation system, totally experimental at this point, no idea if it will ever work the way I imagined :-)
* PigLex and PigYacc, my own go versions of lex and yacc, for the connoisseurs
* PigLang, the integration of the two above into a language generator

...
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
